title: CTE Teacher (See Description for Details)
status: Full Time, 1 FTEAgriculture, Arts & Design, Health Human ServMinimum Requirements:An Active Utah Secondary Education Teaching License with applicable CTE Agriculture Endorsement, applicable CTE Arts, Entertainment, and Design Endorsement, and applicable CTE Healthcare and Human Services Endorsement.The salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule. To estimate possible step placement on the TT Salary Schedule, select following linkTT Step Placement Calculator.Attachment(s):Secondary Education Teacher.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
